COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

Welcome to Manufacturing & Operations at Scale!
I’m Rich Li and I’m the co-founder of Brosa, an
online furniture retailer, and the luggage brand,
July. Within the first nine months of July, I helped it
secure $10.5 million in funding. Meanwhile Brosa has
become Australia’s largest online furniture retailer
worth over $60M AUD with over 3,000 different
products and 10,000 different SKUs.
Before BROSA and July, I built my experience in
ecommerce as the largest seller to Groupon Group
globally, sourcing and creating products from China
for retail sale in the US, Australia, Canada and New
Zealand.
In this module, I’ll teach you how I’ve set up the
entire supply chain operations for my businesses
from the ground up from product sourcing,
manufacturing, logistics all the way to the end
consumer.
